/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libaircraft_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libaircraft_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/aircraft_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/aircraft_msgs/msg/detail/aircraft_state__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/aircraft_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libaircraft_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.5 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
